sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, arraySlice(values, 2) AS sliced_values FROM test_array;
UPDATE test_array SET values = arraySlice(values, -2, 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arraySlice(values, 1, 3) AS first_three FROM test_array WHERE id = 2;
